message:
feat(core): add formal spec pack for scheduler, budget, and recovery invariants (ft-2p9cb.5.1.1)

E1 types: InvariantDomain, InvariantSeverity, FormalInvariant,
SchedulerInvariant (6 predicates), BudgetInvariant (6 predicates),
RecoveryInvariant (6 predicates), InvariantOutcome, InvariantCheckResult,
InvariantCheckerConfig, InvariantChecker with domain-specific check methods,
InvariantCheckerSnapshot, InvariantCheckerDegradation, InvariantCheckerLogEntry.
51 unit tests (613 total). Also fixes workflows.rs missing replay_capture field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
